security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data may be altered in transit without detection.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Tampering attacks are possible without proper data validation.

assumptions: The system does not employ end-to-end encryption for vote submissions.
The actor can intercept and modify vote data in transit.

mitigation.strategy: Implement data integrity checks and possibly end-to-end encryption.

description: An attacker may intercept and alter the vote data before it reaches the governance contract.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not trace the origin of votes.

assumptions: The system does not log vote submissions with sufficient user identification.
The actor can submit votes anonymously or with fake identities.

mitigation.strategy: Implement logging and auditing mechanisms to track vote origins.

description: An attacker may cast votes and deny their participation.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data may be exposed during transmission or storage.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Sensitive vote data could be exposed due to insecure data handling.

assumptions: Vote data is transmitted or stored using insecure channels or methods.
The actor can access or intercept vote data through vulnerabilities in the system.

mitigation.strategy: Encrypt vote data during transmission and storage.

description: An attacker may obtain sensitive information about the votes submitted.
